name: Tower War
description: Tower War is a fast and exciting strategy game where you compete to take over enemy towers. The rules are simple, but winning takes skill: drag from your base to an enemy tower to send your troops and capture it. Connect towers smartly and act quickly to outplay your opponent and take control. Every level is unique, with different tower arrangements and challenges that test your timing and strategy. You’ll need to think fast, plan your moves, and react to the enemy before they strike back. With over 30 fun and challenging levels, each stage brings a new puzzle to solve and more action to enjoy.
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
